criteria.reason: Self-contained authenticated smoke script added and lint checks that it does not import tests.
Smoke generates suggestions with an injected fake generator.
Live smoke blocks apply without confirm and validates no service mutation.
Live smoke confirms apply succeeds and updates two LocalOS services.
Live smoke verifies blocked and completed audit events with no external write/credit charge metadata.
Live smoke verifies ledger count is unchanged by apply.
Backend lint baseline includes and passes the new smoke guardrail.

commands_run: PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_services_optimization.py tests/test_approval_boundaries_audit.py tests/test_operator_paid_action_adapter.py tests/test_operator_review_reply_bulk.py tests/test_operator_paid_executor.py tests/test_operator_manual_publish.py
live smoke through server app container
